features.description: Fix file tabs on mobile UIX portrait.

features.description: Fix underline behavior while preserving standard Markdown semantics unless custom profile enables it.

features.description: Provide MdWrk editor text wrap behavior.

features.description: Option to turn off line count bars.

features.description: Keep line count aligned with editor when y-scrolled.

features.description: Remove idb persistent from the status bar footer.

features.description: Remove saved state from status footer and autosave everything.

features.title: Status bar separators
features.description: Fix separators on the status bar.

features.title: PWA install button installed state
features.description: Remove install button after PWA is installed.

features.title: Header settings icon spacing
features.description: Add small top and right margin to the settings icon.

adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Features are the targetable units
Issues are plannable work items
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Normalized prefixed IDs
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Immutable boundary and release snapshots
Fail-closed guards
Generated projections are non-canonical
Explicit schema versioning
Portable SSOT core with repo-specific evidence adapters
Enforce max path and filename lengths under `.ssot`
Profiles are reusable feature bundles with derived pass status
